title: UFO Mini Drone, Kids Toys Hand Controlled Helicopter RC Quadcopter Infrared Induction Remote Control Aeroplanes Flying Toy for Boys Girls
features: Gesture control: when your hand is nearby, the drone can fly in the opposite direction. You can control it with your hands in the air to play interactive games, get super cool and enjoy super fun! UFO has five sensors that allow children to play happily with other children

Rotating: The aircraft with flying saucer has 4 powerful rotary motors that can perform a ​​​ rotating motion. If you fly to a certain level, there is also a high floating flight. If you do not operate within 1-2 seconds, the aircraft sinks slightly and floats again.

Infrared sensor floating technology: the flying ball has advanced LED infrared sensor floating technology, induction suspension and anti-collision protection. The built-in gyroscope can control precision and sensitivity to achieve balance. All you have to do is carefully throw away the flying ball toy, it can immediately take off.

Rechargeable battery and luminous LED light: the built-in rechargeable takes only 40 minutes to complete the charge. It also features 2 flying speed models, green light for medium speed mode and blue light for high speed mode. The mini drone lights up bright and colourful when it flies at night.

Sturdy, special aircraft case: the flying saucer flight toy is made of high-quality non-toxic PP material, is lightweight and flexible and has a strong shock resistance. The elastic material is designed to withstand damage when dropped. When a fixed object is detected, the flying plane can also move intelligently.
